visuals.title: Default Reasoning Process
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Symbolic Reasoning Under Uncertainty</text>
  
  <!-- Central Brain Icon -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="40" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <path d="M195 160c-2 0-4 2-4 4s2 4 4 4h30c2 0 4-2 4-4s-2-4-4-4h-30zM195 170c-2 0-4 2-4 4s2 4 4 4h30c2 0 4-2 4-4s-2-4-4-4h-30zM195 180c-2 0-4 2-4 4s2 4 4 4h30c2 0 4-2 4-4s-2-4-4-4h-30z" fill="white" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Left Box: Knowledge Base -->
  <rect x="50" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Knowledge Base
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Right Box: Probabilistic Rules -->
  <rect x="270" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Probabilistic Rules
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Bottom Box: Inference Engine -->
  <rect x="160" y="250" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Inference Engine
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows connecting boxes to center -->
  <path d="M150 100L190 155" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M270 100L230 155" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M210 215L210 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Uncertainty Visualization -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="55" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Uncertainty Boundary
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
